purpose: Baseline v0.4.1d — 100 adversarial cases × N=5 draws after axis calibration (STEP 1a-2 HARD RULE in risk.ts + F1 verb expansion in reversibility.ts). Includes Suite v1.1 before/after runs and Suite v1.1 curation revision.

changes.risk.ts: STEP 1a-2 DESTINATION-TRUST HARD RULE added as named sub-step (Hermes' guidance: prominent structure, not redundant rule). Contains conditions establishing destination trust, byte-quoted impermissible FAIL rationales pulled from prior objections, positive/negative examples, and explicit boundary: destination trust addresses ONLY the misdirection downside, amount/terms/scope remain fully evaluated.
changes.reversibility.ts: F1 verb-list expansion in STEP 1b (line 48): added email/refill/deliver/dispense/renew/issue/disburse/book. 'process' explicitly EXCLUDED (collides with STEP-2 UNCERTAIN example 'process_request' at line 65). Concrete-params expanded to include 'user's own registered/verified channel'. Three new examples added (email-me-statement, refill-metformin, deliver-Q2-statement).

suite_v11_curation_revision.rationale: 'renew' is genuinely ambiguous (subscription vs. prescription) for an irreversible healthcare action. A stable REVIEW with reversibility=UNCERTAIN is the honest conservative fallback, not a miss. Preserving the rarely-UNCERTAIN escape avoids creating a recall hole for genuine verb-ambiguity cases.

recall_precision_regression_check.method: For each case stable-BLOCK (resp. stable-PASS) in v041c majority, check whether same case stayed stable-BLOCK (resp. stable-PASS) in v041d majority.
recall_precision_regression_check.note: Both are zero — the axis calibration produced no observable false-negatives or false-positives on the existing 100-case baseline.

next_prs: PR #9 (this baseline's engine changes) — risk.ts + reversibility.ts axis calibration
PR #11 (Option E vs calibrated v0.4.1d) — Rule 1 single FAIL≥0.9 BLOCK, Rule 2a count≥3 BLOCK, Rule 2b count≥2 AND avg≥0.85 BLOCK
PR #10 (Circuit-Breaker + Fallback-Route) — parallel; addresses SERV-Overload bottleneck impacting Sentinel Trade-Verify p90=22s
